The 315-tree apple orchard (Common Delicious, Jonathan, Rome, Beauty, and Winesap varieties) at the Buckner Homestead is managed by the National Park Service as a historic site:
http://www.nps.gov/noca/planyourvisit/buckner-orchard-loop.htm

Stehekin State-6S9, Company Creek Rd, Stehekin, WA 98852, USA
A small but prolific bush on the edge of the Stehekin Airstrip. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
